trigger_email_summary: A fictional gambling operator responds to a duplicate bet complaint but does not reconcile the duplicated wager, system timestamp, or balance adjustment.

timeline_events.summary: Synthetic user reports that a wager was duplicated during a platform error. Redaction warning: do not store real bet slips or wallet screenshots.
Complaint asks the operator to reverse one duplicate wager and explain the system error.
Operator says the transaction appears valid but gives no technical reconciliation.

extracted_deadlines.action_required: Request ledger and system-error investigation result.

evidence_matrix.why_it_matters: Would show the duplicated wager entries.
Needed to reconcile debits and reversals.
Needed to verify whether the platform error affected the wager.

missing_evidence: Reason duplicate entry was not reversed
company_response_gaps: No explanation for duplicate wager treatment
recommended_next_action: Ask the operator for a transaction ledger, technical incident result, and written reason for refusing reversal of the duplicate wager.
draft_reply_outline: Identify the disputed duplicate wager in synthetic terms.
Request ledger reconciliation and technical investigation findings.
Ask for reversal or detailed written basis for refusal.
State that escalation will follow if the gap remains unresolved.

telegram_card_preview.title: DP-GAM-001: Duplicate wager system gap
telegram_card_preview.body: Medium priority. Operator response lacks ledger and technical reconciliation. Recommended: request evidence and reversal basis.

redaction_required.warning: Replace real bet slips, transaction IDs, account names, screenshots, chat transcripts, and exact operator wording with fictional placeholders.
